record.field: claimants_line_ids = records.x_claimants_line_ids if claimants_line_ids: claimants_line_ids.write({'x_share': 100 / len(claimants_line_ids)})
Industry Lawyer: Calculate Claimant Share on Create and Delete Claimant line

claimants_lines = record.partner_id.x_claimants_line_ids for claimant_line in claimants_lines: # One invoice per claimant for invoice in record.invoice_ids: new_invoice = invoice.copy({'partner_id': claimant_line.x_claimant_id.id}) for orig_line, new_line in zip(invoice.invoice_line_ids, new_invoice.invoice_line_ids): new_line.write({'price_unit': new_line.price_unit / len(claimants_lines) if new_line.price_unit else 0.0}) invoice.write({'state': 'cancel'}) action = env['ir.actions.act_window']._for_xml_id('account.action_move_out_invoice')
Industry Lawyer: Split Invoice per Claimant From Quotation

claimants_lines = record.partner_id.x_claimants_line_ids for claimant_line in claimants_lines: # One invoice per claimant new_invoice = record.copy({'partner_id': claimant_line.x_claimant_id.id}) for orig_line, new_line in zip(record.invoice_line_ids, new_invoice.invoice_line_ids): new_line.write({'price_unit': new_line.price_unit / len(claimants_lines) if new_line.price_unit else 0.0}) record.write({'state': 'cancel'}) action = env['ir.actions.act_window']._for_xml_id('account.action_move_out_invoice')
Industry Lawyer: Split Invoice per Claimant

if record.composition_mode == 'comment' and not record.partner_ids: record['partner_ids'] = [(6, 0, env[record.model].browse(record._evaluate_res_ids()).partner_id.ids)] suggest_approver = env.user.x_suggest_approver_id vals = {'partner_ids': [(4, pid) for pid in set(record.partner_ids.mapped('x_claimants_line_ids.x_claimant_id').ids)],} if suggest_approver: vals['x_approver_id'] = suggest_approver.id record.write(vals)
Industry Lawyer: Update Additional Contacts in Mail Compose

suggest_approver = env.user.x_suggest_approver_id vals = {'mail_partner_ids': [(4, pid) for pid in set(record.mail_partner_ids.mapped('x_claimants_line_ids.x_claimant_id').ids)],} if suggest_approver: vals['x_invoice_approver_id'] = suggest_approver.id record.write(vals)
Industry Lawyer: Update Additional Contacts in Account Move Send
Industry Lawyer: Submit For Approval from Chatter

ctx = env.context currect_record = env[ctx.get('default_model')].browse(ctx.get('default_res_id')) msg_vals = { 'author_id': currect_record.env.user.id, 'author_guest_id': False, 'email_from': False, 'model': currect_record._name, 'res_id': currect_record.id, 'body': ctx.get('body'), 'message_type': 'comment', 'parent_id': currect_record._message_compute_parent_id(currect_record.env.user.partner_id.id), 'subject': False, 'partner_ids': ctx.get('partner_ids'), 'record_company_id': currect_record._mail_get_companies(default=currect_record.env.company)[currect_record.id].id, } message = currect_record.message_post(body = ctx.get('body'), message_type='comment', subtype_xmlid='mail.mt_comment')
partners_data = currect_record._notify_get_recipients(message, msg_vals=msg_vals) for _lang, render_values, recipients_group in currect_record._notify_get_classified_recipients_iterator( message, partners_data, msg_vals=msg_vals, model_description=False, force_email_company=False, force_email_lang=False, force_record_name=False, subtitles=None, ): # generate notification email content mail_body = currect_record._notify_by_email_render_layout(message, recipients_group, msg_vals=msg_vals, render_values=render_values,) mail = env['mail.mail'].with_context(mail_create_nolog=True).create({ 'body_html': mail_body or '', 'mail_message_id': message.id, 'partner_ids': ctx.get('partner_ids'), 'author_id': env.user.partner_id.id, 'x_author_id': env.user.id, 'subject': currect_record.name or '', 'recipient_ids': ctx.get('partner_ids'), # 'state': 'outgoing', }) mail_for_approval = env['x_approval_mail'].create({'x_mail_id': mail.id, 'x_approval_status': 'pending'})

approver_id = record.x_approver_id if not approver_id: raise UserError("Please select an approval user before submitting this email for approval.") for current_record in env[record.model].browse(record._evaluate_res_ids()): mail = env['mail.mail'].create({'attachment_ids': [(6, 0, record.attachment_ids.ids)], 'body_html': record.body or '', 'partner_ids': record.partner_ids.ids, 'author_id': env.user.partner_id.id, 'x_author_id': env.user.id, 'scheduled_date': record.scheduled_date, 'subject': record.subject or '', 'recipient_ids': [(6, 0, record.partner_ids.ids)], 'reply_to': record.reply_to or False,}) mail_for_approval = env['x_approval_mail'].create({'x_mail_id': mail.id, 'x_approval_status': 'pending', 'x_approved_by_id': approver_id.id, 'x_res_model': record.model, 'x_res_id': current_record.id}) env.user.write({'x_suggest_approver_id': approver_id.id}) approver_mail = mail.copy({'x_author_id': approver_id.id}) mail_for_approval.copy({'x_mail_id': approver_mail.id})

invoice_approver_id = record.x_invoice_approver_id if not invoice_approver_id: raise UserError("Please select an approval user before submitting this email for approval.") move_id = record.move_id invoice_attachment_id = move_id.invoice_pdf_report_id if invoice_attachment_id: invoice_attachment_id.write({'res_id': False, 'res_field': False}) else: invoices_data_pdf = {move: {**record._get_default_sending_settings(move, from_cron=False, **record._get_sending_settings()),} for move in move_id} record._prepare_invoice_pdf_report(invoices_data_pdf) pdf_attachment_values = invoices_data_pdf[move_id]['pdf_attachment_values'] invoice_attachment_id = record.env['ir.attachment'].create({'name': pdf_attachment_values.get('name'), 'raw': pdf_attachment_values.get('raw'), 'type': 'binary'})
mail = env['mail.mail'].create({'attachment_ids': [(6, 0, [invoice_attachment_id.id])], 'body_html': record.body or '', 'partner_ids': record.mail_partner_ids.ids, 'author_id': env.user.partner_id.id, 'x_author_id': env.user.id, 'subject': record.subject or '', 'recipient_ids': [(6, 0, record.mail_partner_ids.ids)],}) mail_for_approval = env['x_approval_mail'].create({'x_mail_id': mail.id, 'x_approval_status': 'pending', 'x_approved_by_id': invoice_approver_id.id, 'x_res_model': record.model, 'x_res_id': move_id.id}) env.user.write({'x_suggest_approver_id': invoice_approver_id.id}) approver_mail = mail.copy({'x_author_id': invoice_approver_id.id}) mail_for_approval.copy({'x_mail_id': approver_mail.id})
Industry Lawyer: Submit For Approval in Account Move Send

for record in records: mail = record.x_mail_id mail.send() if mail.state == 'sent': env[records.x_res_model].browse(records.x_res_id).message_post(body = record.x_body_html, message_type='comment', subtype_xmlid = 'mail.mt_comment', attachment_ids = record.x_attachment_ids.ids) records.write({'x_approval_status': 'sent'}) action = env['ir.actions.act_window']._for_xml_id('industry_lawyer.approval_email_action')
records.write({'x_approval_status': 'pending'}) for rec in records: rec.x_mail_id.write({'state': 'outgoing'})
records.write({'x_approval_status': 'cancelled'}) for rec in records: rec.x_mail_id.write({'state': 'cancel'})
Industry Lawyer: Link Attachments to Project Documents

project = env.ref('industry_lawyer.project_project_3', raise_if_not_found=False) folder = project.documents_folder_id if project and folder and record.res_model == 'project.task' and record.res_id in project.task_ids.ids: env['documents.document'].create({'attachment_id': attachment.id, 'folder_id': folder.id, 'name': attachment.name or project.name})
